UC-001.Action: Selects a PDF file for compression
UC-001.Goal: To compress a PDF file and reduce its size
UC-001.AcceptanceCriteria: - User can select PDF file via file picker - Only PDF files are accepted - File size is displayed before compression

UC-002.Goal: To control the trade-off between file size and quality
UC-002.AcceptanceCriteria: - Three preset levels available: Low, Medium, High - Each level has predefined quality and scale settings - Selected level is clearly indicated in UI

UC-003.Goal: To reduce file size without server upload
UC-003.AcceptanceCriteria: - All processing happens in browser - No data is sent to external servers - Progress is displayed during compression - Original file remains unchanged

UC-004.Goal: To save the compressed file locally
UC-004.AcceptanceCriteria: - Download starts automatically after compression - Compression statistics are displayed - User can see original vs compressed size

UC-005.Goal: To prevent processing of non-PDF files
UC-005.AcceptanceCriteria: - Clear error message for invalid file types - User can select a different file - No crash or undefined behavior

UC-006.AcceptanceCriteria: - Clear error message for corrupted files - Error code is specific to the issue - User can try a different file

UC-007.Goal: To understand how long compression will take
UC-007.AcceptanceCriteria: - Progress bar shows completion percentage - Status text indicates current operation - UI remains responsive during compression

UC-008.Goal: To see the effectiveness of compression
UC-008.AcceptanceCriteria: - Original size displayed - Compressed size displayed - Compression ratio/percentage shown - Results clearly formatted and readable

CONSTR-001.Title: Client-side only processing
CONSTR-001.Description: All PDF processing must happen in the browser. No server uploads.
CONSTR-001.Rationale: Privacy and data security - user files never leave their device

CONSTR-002.Title: Browser extension context
CONSTR-002.Description: Must work as Chrome/Firefox extension with side panel UI

CONSTR-003.Title: File size limits
CONSTR-003.Description: Browser memory limits apply - very large files may fail
